trades.reasoning: Top momentum score (100) with confirmed MACD bullish crossover, RSI in ideal 55-70 zone, and volume surge — cleanest technical setup on the screener today.

Score 95 with volume surge and RSI 67.9 near the upper bullish zone; steel names showing strength likely tied to infrastructure/tariff-reshoring tailwinds, deploying remaining cash to fill an open slot.

decisions.briefing: Market is nearly flat today — NASDAQ +0.2% and S&P 500 +0.1% — suggesting quiet consolidation rather than a risk-off move. Existing positions (GOOGL, QQQ, AMZN, MSTR, AAOI) are all above cost and away from stop-loss levels, so no defensive action is needed. With 5 open slots and $1,173 in cash above the $500 threshold, the rules call for deploying into our best candidates — JOBY earns the highest score on the screener with a clean volume-backed breakout, and CLF adds sector diversification via the steel/materials space.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted marginally higher on April 28, with both the NASDAQ and S&P 500 posting fractional gains as investors awaited key macro catalysts including upcoming Fed commentary and Q1 GDP data. Trading volumes were subdued, consistent with a 'wait-and-see' posture ahead of month-end rebalancing flows. Individual momentum names in uranium, steel, and EV-adjacent sectors outperformed the tape, suggesting selective risk appetite rather than broad market conviction.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股於4月28日窄幅上揚，納斯達克及標普500指數均錄得微幅漲幅，市場靜待聯儲局官員講話及第一季GDP數據等關鍵宏觀催化劑。成交量偏低，反映投資者在月底再平衡資金流入前普遍採取觀望態度。鈾礦、鋼鐵及電動航空等板塊個股則跑贏大市，顯示市場風險偏好仍具選擇性，而非全面性入市。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing means buying stocks that have been trending upward — betting that recent price strength will continue in the near term. Traders use signals like RSI in the 55-70 range, MACD bullish crossovers, and above-average volume to confirm that buying pressure is real and not fading. Today's top picks (JOBY, CLF) were chosen precisely because all three of those momentum indicators aligned at once.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略是指買入近期持續上漲的股票，押注價格強勢將延續。交易者通常以RSI介於55至70之間、MACD出現黃金交叉，以及成交量高於均值等技術訊號，確認買盤動能真實且持續。今日首選的JOBY及CLF，正是因為上述三項動能指標同時發出看漲訊號才被選入。
